_comment: @stage-labs/config — shared TypeScript base for the pure-TS packages (packages/client, packages/kit, apps/api, apps/proxy). The full `strict` family is enabled (and spelled out explicitly so the strict bar is auditable in one place), plus noUncheckedIndexedAccess + noImplicitOverride. Every workspace tsconfig extends this (directly or layered) so strictness is uniform across the monorepo.
